observation_intake_references.description: Read-only DevHub labels and structural placeholder rows for offline candidate assembly.

redaction_coverage_checks.scope: labels, landmarks, validation copy classes, and action boundaries
redaction_coverage_checks.notes: No account identifiers, user-entered values, case numbers, document names, or local paths are retained.

private_value_omission_evidence.replacement_policy: Use stable synthetic labels and placeholder identifiers only.

unsupported_manual_handoff_reminders.condition: Any credentialed, certification, payment, final filing, calendar booking, cancellation, or file-transfer workflow.
unsupported_manual_handoff_reminders.required_response: Stop automation and require attended user control.

fixture_promotion_holds.reason: Synthetic delta rows remain inactive until reviewer acceptance and separate promotion controls pass.

reviewer_routing.routing_reason: Verify read-only scope, selector confidence, redaction policy, and action boundaries.

rollback_notes.note: Discard the generated inactive delta candidate rows and rebuild from accepted synthetic fixtures if any retained field is later found to be private or account-scoped.

prior_surface_map_fixture_placeholders.label: Permit overview status heading
prior_surface_map_fixture_placeholders.validation_message: Synthetic status heading placeholder retained as label only.

prior_surface_map_fixture_placeholders.label: Submit application control
prior_surface_map_fixture_placeholders.validation_message: Official action control is represented only as a blocked synthetic label.

prior_surface_map_fixture_placeholders.label: Plans file control
prior_surface_map_fixture_placeholders.validation_message: File control evidence is label-only; no file interaction is represented.
